keywordspec.name: lge.auto.CANOE
keywordspec.doc:
API for setup/usage of Canoe COM Client interface.
There are 3 ways of control CANoe.
1. Case of does not open canoe application | #Open canoe application | | `Open Simulation` | ${cfg file path} | | #run BAP SIM | | `Start Measurement` | | #Set Environment Variables | | `Set EnvVar` | P_FSG_77_0_0_13_1_0 | 1 | | #stop BAP SIM | | `Stop Measurement` | | #close canoe application | | `Close Simulation` |
2. Case of open canoe application by BAP cfg and does not running BAP | #run BAP SIM | | `Start Measurement` | | #Set Environment Variables | | `Set EnvVar` | P_FSG_77_0_0_13_1_0 | 1 | | #stop BAP SIM | | `Stop Measurement` |
3. Case of open canoe application by BAP cfg and running BAP | #Set Environment Variables | | `Set EnvVar` | P_FSG_77_0_0_13_1_0 | 1 |

kw.name: Close Simulation
kw.doc:
Close Simulation (cfg file) and close CANoe applicaton
Examples: | `Close Simulation` |
kw.shortdoc: Close Simulation (cfg file) and close CANoe applicaton

kw.name: Get EnvVar
kw.doc:
Get environment variable value
argument: - ``var`` : Environment variable name
Examples: | ${result} | `Get EnvVar` | P_FSG_77_0_0_13_1_0 |

kw.name: Open Simulation
kw.doc:
Open Simulation (cfg file)
argument: - ``cfgname`` : cfg file path
Examples: | `Open Simulation` | D:\BAP-SIM_ICAS3_all-in-one_v9.14F\BAP-SIM_ICAS3_all-in-one_CAN_10_0.cfg |

kw.name: Set EnvVar
kw.doc:
Set environment variable value
argument: - ``var`` : Environment variable name - ``value`` : Environment variable value , type is float Examples: | `Set EnvVar` | P_FSG_77_0_0_13_1_0 | 1 |
